en: Cast your bread upon the waters, for you will find it after many days.
zh: 要把你的糧食撒在水面上，因為日久你必得回。

en: Give a portion to seven, or even to eight, for you know not what disaster may happen on earth.
zh: 你要分為七份，或分為八份，因為你不知道將來會有甚麼災禍在地上發生。

en: If the clouds are full of rain, they empty themselves on the earth, and if a tree falls to the south or to the north, in the place where the tree falls, there it will lie.
zh: 雲若充滿水氣，雨就傾倒在地上；樹無論向南倒，或向北倒，倒在哪裡，就橫在哪裡。

en: He who observes the wind will not sow, and he who regards the clouds will not reap.
zh: 看風的，不撒種；觀雲的，不收割。

en: As you do not know the way the spirit comes to the bones in the womb of a woman with child, so you do not know the work of God who makes everything.
zh: 你不曉得風的路向，不知道骨頭如何在孕婦胎中形成，照樣，創造萬物之 神的作為，你也不得而知。

en: In the morning sow your seed, and at evening withhold not your hand, for you do not know which will prosper, this or that, or whether both alike will be good.
zh: 早晨要撒你的種，直到黃昏也不要歇手；因為你不知道哪一樣種得成，是早撒的，或晚撒的，或兩者都一樣好。

en: Light is sweet, and it is pleasant for the eyes to see the sun.
zh: 光是美好的，眼睛得見天日，也是好的。

en: So if a person lives many years, let him rejoice in them all; but let him remember that the days of darkness will be many. All that comes is vanity.
zh: 人無論多長壽，都當樂在其中，不過他要想到黑暗的日子，因為這些日子將會很多；要來的，都是虛空的。

en: Rejoice, O young man, in your youth, and let your heart cheer you in the days of your youth. Walk in the ways of your heart and the sight of your eyes. But know that for all these things God will bring you into judgment.
zh: 年輕人哪！你在幼年時要快樂，在壯年的日子，要使你的心歡暢；順著你心所願的，眼所見的去行。不過，你要知道，為了這一切事， 神必審問你。

en: Remove vexation from your heart, and put away pain from your body, for youth and the dawn of life are vanity.
zh: 所以你當除掉心中的煩惱，除去肉體的疾苦，因為無論是幼年或是壯年，都是虛空的。
